children.name: div
children.textContent: March is your best month yet!

children.name: div
children.textContent: You're on track to divert 40+ items. Keep going.

children.name: div
children.textContent: 💡 Switch to 5th Ave Refill Station — saves ~8 items/mo

children.name: div
children.textContent: 💡 Great work! Down 30% vs last month. Keep it up.

children.name: div
children.textContent: 💡 A backyard compost bin could handle most of this.

children.name: div
children.textContent: 💡 Brew & Co buys back clean glass — earn store credit.

children.name: div
children.textContent: 💡 Repair Café on Sundays fixes small electronics free.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Durable glass containers vs single-use plastic
